title: Polwocz
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Polwocz''' were creatures native to the [[Spinward sector/Legends|Spinward sector]]. They laid their eggs underground, where they lay dormant for as long as decades. When they finally hatched, the larvae were rumored to have eaten entire cities. [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] referred to a deep-cover [[Infiltration]] agent intended to stay in place for [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before breaking cover in one devastating blow as a "[[Polwocz (agent)|polwocz]]."

{{Species-stub}}
